_fixture_notes: Case 7: Derived component with non-contiguous step_indices. Parent recipe has 7 steps (indices 0-6); derived component picks [0, 3, 5] — skipping steps 1, 2, 4, 6. Tests whether the importer correctly copies non-contiguous step slices, whether step ordering in the copied component preserves the original sort_order, and whether the derived component renders coherently with gaps.
name: Roasted Squash Bowl with Infused Lemon Oil
description: Roasted squash plated with an infused lemon-herb oil that's built across multiple steps. Fixture for non-contiguous derived component step ranges.

steps.title: Combine the infused oil base
steps.content: Combine {0001}, {0002} and {0003} in a small bowl. Leave to infuse while you prepare the rest of the dish.

steps.title: Start the squash
steps.content: Heat oven to 220°C. Toss {0005} with {0006} on a tray and season. Roast for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Cook the lentils
steps.content: Combine {0007} with {0008} in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce to a simmer, and cook for 25 minutes until tender. Drain.

steps.title: Finish the infused oil with herbs
steps.content: Stir {0004} into the infused oil. Taste and season.

steps.title: Check the squash
steps.content: The squash should be deeply caramelised at the edges. If not, return to the oven for a further 5-10 minutes.

steps.title: Rest the lemon oil
steps.content: Allow the lemon oil to stand at room temperature for at least 10 minutes for the flavours to develop.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.content: Spoon lentils onto plates, top with roasted squash and {0009}, and drizzle generously with the lemon oil.

notes: The infused oil benefits from at least 30 minutes' standing time if you can spare it.

derived_components.name: Lemon & Herb Infused Oil
derived_components.description: A standalone infused oil for drizzling over roast vegetables, grains or grilled fish.
derived_components.notes: Three-step preparation pulled from the parent recipe — combine (step 0), finish with herbs (step 3), rest (step 5).
